known_issues.title: Ignition coil pack failure
known_issues.description: Ignition coils are a chronic weak point on VW's four-cylinder engines, failing one at a time and causing a rough idle, misfire codes, and reduced power.
known_issues.symptoms: A rough or shaky idle, an intermittent check engine light with a flashing pattern under load, and a noticeable stumble or loss of power on acceleration.
known_issues.recommendation: Ask for records of prior coil pack replacements and scan for stored misfire codes before buying.

known_issues.title: Water pump failure (TSI engines)
known_issues.description: The 1.8T and 2.0T EA888 engines use a water pump with a plastic impeller that can crack or fail, leading to coolant loss and overheating.
known_issues.symptoms: The temperature gauge climbing higher than normal, a low coolant warning light, or a sweet coolant smell near the front of the engine.
known_issues.recommendation: Check coolant level and look under the car for stains near the water pump housing at the front of the engine.

known_issues.title: Window regulator failure
known_issues.description: Window regulators can fail, causing the glass to drop into the door or move unevenly.
known_issues.symptoms: A window that moves slowly, unevenly, or drops suddenly into the door, sometimes accompanied by a grinding noise from inside the door panel.
known_issues.recommendation: Cycle all four windows fully up and down and listen for grinding.

known_issues.title: Timing chain tensioner wear on TSI engines
known_issues.description: Early production 2.0T TSI engines are prone to timing chain tensioner wear, which can allow the chain to skip and cause a rattling noise on startup.
known_issues.symptoms: A rattling or ticking noise from the front of the engine for a few seconds after a cold start, sometimes fading once oil pressure builds.
known_issues.recommendation: Listen carefully for a rattle in the first few seconds after a cold start and ask if the updated tensioner was installed.

known_issues.title: Carbon buildup on intake valves
known_issues.description: Direct injection on the TSI engines leads to carbon accumulation on the intake valves, causing a rough idle and reduced power over time.
known_issues.symptoms: A rough or uneven idle and a gradual loss of power and responsiveness under acceleration.
known_issues.recommendation: Ask whether a walnut-shell intake cleaning has ever been done and note any idle roughness.

generations.label: 7th Gen
generations.common_competitors: Honda Civic Hatchback, Mazda3 Hatchback, Subaru Impreza

known_issues.title: DSG dual-clutch transmission mechatronic failure
known_issues.description: The DSG's mechatronic control unit can fail or develop jerky, hesitant shifts, particularly from a stop, as the internal clutch packs and fluid degrade.
known_issues.symptoms: A jerky or delayed engagement from a stop, occasional clunks between gears, and sometimes a transmission warning light on the dash.
known_issues.recommendation: Test drive extensively in stop-and-go traffic and feel for jerky or delayed engagement from a stop.

known_issues.title: Ignition coil pack failure
known_issues.description: Coils fail individually over time, producing a rough idle and misfire codes.
known_issues.symptoms: A rough or shaky idle and an intermittent check engine light, sometimes with a noticeable stumble on acceleration.
known_issues.recommendation: Scan for stored misfire codes and ask about coil replacement history.

known_issues.title: Electronic thermostat / water pump housing failure
known_issues.description: The integrated electronic thermostat and water pump module can fail internally, causing erratic temperature readings or coolant loss.
known_issues.symptoms: A temperature gauge that fluctuates or reads unusually high or low, and coolant residue near the front of the engine.
known_issues.recommendation: Watch the temperature gauge during the test drive for slow warm-up or fluctuation, and check for coolant residue near the front of the engine.

known_issues.title: Carbon buildup on intake valves
known_issues.description: Direct injection leads to carbon deposits on the intake valves over time, reducing throttle response and smoothness.
known_issues.symptoms: A rough idle and a noticeable hesitation or flat spot when accelerating from low RPM.
known_issues.recommendation: Ask about intake cleaning history and note any rough idle or hesitation.

known_issues.title: Electrical gremlins in window switches and interior modules
known_issues.description: Minor electrical faults are common, including window switches that stop responding or interior lighting modules that flicker.
known_issues.symptoms: A window switch that doesn't respond on the first press, or interior lights that flicker or stay on intermittently.
known_issues.recommendation: Test every window switch, interior light, and accessory during the test drive.
